CainCraft Circadia

Field Notes and Anecdotes

A running archive of projects, places, experiments, repairs, rides, radio checks, flights, photos, and small observations.

April 30, 2026 RC Crawling Build Backyard rock pile

SCX6 backyard suspension test

Project Axial SCX6 Jeep
Stage Suspension tuning

The first pass on the backyard line felt close, but still a little nervous when the truck unloaded off the sharper ledges. I wanted the rear to settle sooner without turning the whole chassis into a wallow.

Conditions

Weather Clear
Temperature 58 F
Light Late afternoon
Gear Used
  • Axial SCX6 Jeep
  • Wheel hex weights
  • Preload collars
  • +1 more
  • backyard
  • suspension
  • tuning
April 30, 2026 Marksmanship Observe Oregon

Calculate Our Range to Target

Testing out my range-finder. This is one of my steel targets set up yonder.

Conditions

Weather 45 Degrees F, Winds Calm
Temperature 45 F
Light Overcase
Gear Used
  • Vortex Fury HD 5000
April 29, 2026 RC Crawling Test Backyard rock pile

Backyard RC Crawling

This is my Axial SCX6 Jeep working through the rougher line behind the shed. The current setup feels planted, but I still want more bite off-camber and a little less chassis slap on the drop-offs.

Conditions

Weather
Temperature
Light
  • backyard
  • testing
  • suspension
April 29, 2026 Camping Build Backyard

Backyard Fire Ring

Last weekend I gathered some stones and built a fire pit. I dig it.

April 27, 2026 Camping Observe Somewhere off the main road

First Entry

Camp went up fast once the wind dropped. Stove on the tailgate, damp boots by the fire ring, and just enough daylight left to mark the trailhead on the map before supper.

Conditions

Weather
Temperature
Light
  • trailhead
  • camp-setup
  • aspens
